title: Omnigent: The New Meta-Harness for EVERY Coding Agent - Claude Code, Codex, Pi, More
summary: Omnigent is a meta-harness that orchestrates multiple coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Pi) as interchangeable workers. It enables routing tasks to different models based on suitability, includes human-in-the-loop governance, and maintains sessions across devices. The framework is open source and designed to help engineers use the right model for each job.
writeup: The video introduces Omnigent, a meta-harness that orchestrates multiple coding models, including Claude Code, Codex, and Pi, as interchangeable workers within a single system. It matters because it abstracts away vendor-specific harnesses, letting different models be routed to tasks rather than locking a workflow to one agent. Key features covered: multi-model task routing, human-in-the-loop governance, and cross-device session persistence.
